Exposure: HIGH

Public entrypoints:
  aws_lb.admin

Reachable workloads:
  aws_ecs_service.admin

Sensitive downstream assets:
  aws_db_instance.customer

Top path:
  internet -> aws_lb.admin -> aws_lb_listener.admin -> aws_lb_target_group.admin -> aws_ecs_service.admin -> aws_security_group.public -> aws_db_instance.customer
